title: Traefik Service
description: Represents an HTTP, TCP, or UDP service in a running Traefik instance, including its load balancer configuration, backend servers, and health check settings.

name.description: The name of the service in name@provider format.

status.description: The current operational status of the service.

provider.description: The configuration provider that created this service (e.g., docker, kubernetes, file).

loadBalancer.description: Load balancer configuration including backend servers and health checks.

serverStatus.description: Map of server URLs to their current health status.

LoadBalancer.description: Load balancer configuration distributing traffic across backend servers.

servers.description: List of backend servers to load balance across.

passHostHeader.description: Whether to pass the original Host header to backend servers.

healthCheck.description: Health check configuration for monitoring backend server availability.

Server.description: A backend server in the load balancer pool.

url.description: The URL of the backend server (HTTP/HTTPS services).

address.description: The address of the backend server in host:port format (TCP/UDP services).

HealthCheck.description: Configuration for periodic health checks against backend servers.

scheme.description: The scheme to use for health check requests (http or https).

path.description: The path to use for health check requests.

port.description: The port to use for health check requests.

timeout.description: The timeout for each health check request (e.g., '5s').
